falsification_conditions.condition: SPX closes below 5200 on any daily session within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The bottom_2024_aug pattern match is invalidated because that formation held a higher low above 5300; a break below 5200 confirms this is not the same structural bottom and the UNKNOWN verdict should flip to BEARISH

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 25 for 2 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The BLOWOFF SCORE of 39 suggests controlled volatility; sustained VIX above 25 indicates genuine panic rather than blowoff washout, invalidating the bottoming thesis and requiring a risk-off reassignment

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops below 3.80% while SPX is simultaneously below 5500
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This combination signals flight-to-safety recession pricing rather than growth-scare bottoming; the pattern match fails because August 2024 saw yields stable/rising during the equity low, proving current dynamics are fundamentally different

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
